notableEvents.label: Jared Young pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: A.J. Ewing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field. Francisco Alvarez scores.

notableEvents.label: A.J. Ewing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher José Alvarado. Jared Young to 3rd. A.J. Ewing to 2nd. Jared Young advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher José Alvarado.

notableEvents.label: Jared Young pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jared Young pops out to shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.label: A.J. Ewing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing grounds out, second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Trea Turner steals (16) 3rd base. Kyle Schwarber steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher José Alvarado. Jared Young to 3rd. A.J. Ewing to 2nd. Jared Young advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher José Alvarado.
